idea-plugin.name: AI Code Reviews
idea-plugin.description:
AI Code Review reviews selected commit changes with an OpenAI-compatible model before they are committed. It helps developers catch risky logic, security, performance, resource, and maintainability issues directly in the IntelliJ IDEA commit workflow.

The plugin reads the selected VCS changes, builds a unified diff, sends it to your configured AI endpoint, and shows review findings before the commit continues. If the review reports issues, you can inspect the result and choose whether to continue or cancel the commit.

  • Runs automatically before commit when enabled.
  • Supports OpenAI-compatible chat completion APIs, custom API URL, API key, and model name.
  • Stores the API key in the IDE PasswordSafe instead of plain settings files.
  • Allows a custom review prompt, with a built-in Chinese prompt as the default.
  • Focuses on concrete bugs, security risks, performance problems, resource leaks, and missing tests.

中文说明

AI Code Review 会在提交代码前，使用兼容 OpenAI 的模型审查已选择的提交变更。它可以帮助开发者在 IntelliJ IDEA 的提交流程中提前发现潜在的逻辑错误、安全风险、性能问题、资源泄漏和可维护性问题。

插件会读取当前选择的 VCS 变更，生成 unified diff，发送到你配置的 AI 接口，并在提交继续前展示审查结果。 如果审查结果中包含问题，你可以查看详情后选择继续提交或取消提交。

  • 启用后会在提交前自动执行 AI 代码审查。
  • 支持兼容 OpenAI 的 Chat Completions API，可自定义 API 地址、API Key 和模型名称。
  • API Key 存储在 IDE PasswordSafe 中，不会明文写入普通配置文件。
  • 支持自定义审查提示词，默认内置中文代码审查提示词。
  • 重点关注真实 bug、安全风险、性能问题、资源泄漏和遗漏的测试。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Initial Marketplace release.

  • Added AI review integration for selected VCS changes before commit.
  • Added settings for API URL, API key, model, enable switch, and custom review prompt.
  • Added review result dialog that lets users continue or cancel the commit.

中文：首个 Marketplace 发布版本，支持提交前 AI 审查、接口配置、自定义提示词和审查结果确认对话框。
